title: Cash Garrulan
content:
{{Top|canon=Unidentified Black Sun racketeer}} {{Otheruses|Cash}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image= |name=Cash Garrulan |homeworld=[[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]]''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Murkhana |species=[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You wouldn't lie to me, Vigo.''"
"''Not until I get to know you better.|Darth Vader and Cash Garrulan|}} '''Cash Garrulan''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was once a former [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] until he became the most powerful [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] on [[Murkhana/Legends|Murkhana]]. His hideout was located in the basement of an abandoned building to the south of [[Murkhana City/Legends|Murkhana City]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|This another Cash Garrulan Contact?|[[Roan Shryne]]|}} Shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Roan Shryne]] attempted to shut down Garrulan's operations, but instead the two reached an agreement, and Garrulan became Shryne's informant on the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] military buildup. Retiring to Murkhana after leaving Black Sun, he still was in contact with Shryne, as part of a deal with the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]]. Following [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], Cash helped Roan Shryne and [[Olee Starstone]] escape Murkhana after informing them of the [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|attack]] on the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. He set up the ''[[Dead Ringer]]'' as a decoy while sneaking the two Jedi off aboard a [[CloakShape fighter/Legends|CloakShape fighter]]. Cash himself escaped the system in his [[Skiff/Legends|SoroSuub Skiff]], shortly after dropping a [[Hyperspace transport ring/Legends|booster ring]], which allowed the CloakShape fighter containing the Jedi to jump into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. ===Death=== {{Quote|Do it for Cash.''"
"''I don't owe Cash anything.''"
"''Then do it to honor his memory. Imperials caught up with him soon after Murkhana. He's dead, Roan.|[[Jula Shryne]] persuading [[Roan Shryne|her son]] to help pick up senator [[Fang Zar/Legends|Fang Zar]]|}} After Murkhana, Cash escaped. However, he was soon hunted down and killed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Cash Garrulan |hu=Cash Garrulan }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Garrulan, Cash}} [[Category:Black Sun members]] [[Category:Information brokers]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Twi'leks]] [[Category:Vigos]]
